name: exerly-fitness
description: Exerly Fitness — monorepo with backend, frontend, and mobile apps

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.local: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run local:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.local:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend,mobile -c blue,green,magenta "npm run local:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:mobile"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../mobile && npm install
